cards.name: 7 of Wands
cards.interpretation: protectiveness, standing up for yourself, defending yourself, protecting territory

cards.name: Page of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: foolish, immature, irresponsible, lazy, underachiever, procrastinator, missed chances, poor prospects

cards.name: 4 of Cups
cards.interpretation: apathy, contemplation, feeling disconnected, melancholy, boredom, indifference, discontent
